creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
D'Arcy J.M. Cain wrote:
> On Tue, 29 Aug 2006 12:47:20 -0300
> Renato Botelho <garga@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> 
>> Hello,
>>
>> You set MAINTAINER to ?@FreeBSD.org. Don't you want to maintain this
>> port yourself?
> 
> I assumed that you had to be a FreeBSD committer.  I have no problem
> putting my email address there.

Anybody can maintain a port, you need to be a committer just to
apply changes on ports tree. Thanks to contributing.

-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <freebsd @ galle.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc
